stories.headline: Trump announces strategic petroleum reserve trades for 25% return adding 40M barrels without taxpayer cost

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: The Strategic Petroleum Reserve should be used strategically, not politically. Biden tapped the SPR to try to win an election. President Trump is tactically trading every barrel for a 25% return in the next year, adding 40 million barrels to the SPR without a taxpayer dollar.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: JUST IN: Bitcoin surges 5% to $64,000 after President Trump says Israeli PM Netanyahu has "no choice" but to accept an Iran deal.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: This is a real photo of Donald Trump being helped off the stage today after his event in Wisconsin. This man is not healthy. 25th Amendment NOW

stories.headline: LA mayoral primary results spark fraud claims after late ballot dumps favor Nithya Raman over Spencer Pratt

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: They want you to believe this happened in the LA Mayors race… 3rd place jumps to 1st in *every* ballot drop *after* Election Day Defies all mathematical probability, the law of averages and has never happened in US election history No one with a functional brain believes this

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Timeline of events today: 🇮🇱 Israel strikes Beirut, Lebanon. 🇮🇷 Iran launches ballistic missiles towards Israel. 🇺🇸 President Trump says he's not happy with Israel's initial strike in Beirut & tells Netanyahu not to respond right away. 🇮🇱 Israel strikes Tehran, Iran.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: JUST IN: Progressive Nithya Raman will advance to the general election and face incumbent Karen Bass in the Los Angeles mayoral race, according to Decision Desk HQ projections. It’s over for former reality TV villain Spencer Pratt.

stories.headline: S&P 500 futures erase all losses and turn green.
stories.body: BREAKING: S&P 500 futures erase all losses and turn green

stories.headline: Over ¥48.3 trillion ($335 billion) wiped out from Japan's stock market as NIKKEI plunges 4.2%.
stories.body: BREAKING: Over ¥48,300,000,000,000 ($335 BILLION) wiped out from Japan's stock market as the NIKKEI plunges 4.2%.

stories.headline: Nasdaq with a textbook rejection off the 3-year trendline.
stories.body: Nasdaq with a textbook rejection off the 3-year trendline 🚨🚨 Each of the prior rejections led to an eventual drop all the way down to the 200-day moving average 📉📉

stories.headline: Iran fired missiles at Israel, first such attack since April cease-fire.
stories.body: Breaking News: Iran fired missiles at Israel, the Israeli military said, the first such attack since a cease-fire paused the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran in April. Follow live updates. https://www.nytimes.com/live/2026/06/07/world/iran-israel-missiles?smid=tw-nytimes&smtyp=cur

stories.headline: Russia’s decline gives Turkey freedom to pursue interests, benefiting Ukraine.
stories.body:
In @nytopinion

“Russia’s decline has given Turkey, after a decade of deference to Moscow, the freedom to pursue its interests. Ukraine is the beneficiary,” Gonul Tol writes. https://www.nytimes.com/2026/06/07/opinion/russia-turkey-putin-erdogan-ukraine.html?smid=tw-nytimes&smtyp=cur

stories.headline: User demonstrates perfect round egg frying technique.
stories.body: Sadece beyaz kısmı önce tavaya yayarak uzatın, sonra sarısını ortaya damlatın... Beyaz kısım sarıyı sarıp mükemmel yuvarlak bir göz yumurtası elde edeceksiniz!

stories.headline: NVIDIA and SK hynix announce multiyear partnership for next-gen AI memory
stories.body:
📣 @SKhynix and @NVIDIA announce a multiyear technology partnership to codevelop next-generation memory for the global AI factory buildout.

SK hynix will codevelop memory for NVIDIA's platforms — from NVIDIA Vera Rubin to Jetson Thor — while advancing fab digital twins using @NVIDIAOmniverse libraries and applying NVIDIA CUDA-X and PhysicsNeMo to accelerate semiconductor design and manufacturing.

Read the press release:

stories.headline: Theory of election rigging in LA mayor race
stories.body: The theory here is that election officials working for the incumbent LA mayor rigged the election to ensure a general election opponent that has a chance to beat her? A strange conspiracy

stories.headline: Call for immediate inquest amid cover-up claims
stories.body: Henry’s inquest is delayed until September 2027? Surely not. More evidence the police and government want a cover up. We need an inquest asap!
